messages.content:
Desertification from land clearing is an example of what type of hazard? 

Group of answer choices

Mixed hazard

Man-made (human-made) hazard

Natural hazard
Man-made (human-made) hazard.

Health literacy affects people's ability to: 

[up to 4 correct answers] 

Group of answer choices
Navigate the healthcare system
Share personal information
Understand complex research findings
Engage in self-care and chronic disease management
Engage in care of disease management
Understand concepts such as risk and probability
Understand cultural differences
Understand information in the English language
Navigate the healthcare system, understand complex research findings, engage in self-care and chronic disease management, and understand concepts such as risk and probability.

True or False: We must ensure that health information and literacy is content and context specific to the target audience? 

Group of answer choices

True

False
True.

True of False: Plain language is "dumbing down" the material so it is easily understood?

Group of answer choices

True

False
False.

Knowledge, attitudes, beliefs, and personality traits are all examples of which behaviour change factors? 

Group of answer choices

Individual factors

Interpersonal factors

Institutional factors

Community factors

Public policy factors
Individual factors.

True or False: Road safety is an example of a successfully applied behaviour change theory?

Group of answer choices

True

False
True.

Skills, Practice and Self-efficiency are examples in the Social Learning Model of: 

Group of answer choices

Behavioural Factors

Environmental Factors

Cognitive Factors (also called Personal Factors)
Cognitive Factors (also called Personal Factors).

The Health Belief Model, Trans Theoretical Model, Social Learning Models and Diffusion of Innovation Model are examples of what 

Group of answer choices

Theories of Behaviour Change

Principals of Health Promotion

Health promotion education approaches

Behavioural interventions
Theories of Behaviour Change.

True or False: Some things can cause stress and/or be cause by stress

Group of answer choices

True

False
True.

Which one of these is an example of health promotion?

Group of answer choices

Oral health education

Nutrition assessment

First aid training

All of the above
All of the above.

Tuberculosis is an example of a 

Group of answer choices

Communicable disease

Non-communicable disease

Lung disease

Genetic disease
Communicable disease.
